title: Adarshpatel Marketing — Agriculture, Dairy Feed & Coffee Trading Website

requirements.text: Create a branded homepage for 'Adarshpatel Marketing' with a hero section displaying the company name, tagline covering dairy feed, agri inputs, and coffee trading, and a prominent call-to-action button. The hero section must use the generated agriculture-themed background image.

quotes: Creating app to market and sale a dairy feed product in the name Adarshpatel marketing and also deal with agri inputs and coffee trading

acceptanceCriteria: Company name 'Adarshpatel Marketing' is prominently displayed in the header/hero
Tagline mentions dairy feed, agri inputs, and coffee trading
Hero section uses the agriculture-themed background image
A call-to-action button is visible and leads to the products section

requirements.text: Build a Dairy Feed Products section showcasing dairy feed products with product cards that include a product name, short description, and an 'Enquire Now' or 'Contact Us' button.

quotes: market and sale a dairy feed product

acceptanceCriteria: A dedicated 'Dairy Feed Products' section exists on the page
At least 3 sample product cards are displayed
Each card has a name, description, and enquiry button
Section has a relevant icon or illustration

requirements.text: Build an Agri Inputs section listing agricultural input products (fertilizers, pesticides, seeds, etc.) with product cards showing product name, short description, and an enquiry button.
acceptanceCriteria: A dedicated 'Agri Inputs' section exists on the page
At least 3 sample agri input product cards are shown
Each card has a name, description, and enquiry button
Section visually distinguishes itself from other product sections

requirements.text: Build a Coffee Trading section highlighting coffee trading services and coffee varieties available, with product/service cards and an enquiry button.
acceptanceCriteria: A dedicated 'Coffee Trading' section exists on the page
At least 2–3 coffee product or service cards are displayed
Each card has a name, description, and enquiry button
Section has a visually distinct coffee-themed appearance

requirements.text: Add a Contact / Enquiry section with a simple form (Name, Phone Number, Product of Interest, Message fields) that stores submitted enquiries in the backend canister.

quotes: Creating app to market and sale a dairy feed product

acceptanceCriteria: Contact form has fields: Name, Phone Number, Product of Interest (dropdown with Dairy Feed, Agri Inputs, Coffee Trading), and Message
Submitted enquiries are stored in the backend
User sees a success confirmation after submission
Form validates required fields before submission

requirements.text: Apply a rich, earthy agricultural visual theme throughout the website — warm greens, deep soil browns, coffee browns, and cream/off-white tones. Use bold serif-style headings, clear section dividers, and the generated background image as a full-width hero backdrop. Ensure the design is consistent across all sections.

quotes: Create website with background of agriculture coffee fertilizer dairy all those

acceptanceCriteria: Color palette consistently uses earthy greens, browns, and cream tones
Hero section uses the full-width agriculture-themed background image
Typography uses bold, trustworthy heading styles
All sections have a cohesive visual style
Website is responsive on desktop and mobile

requirements.text: Add a navigation bar with the company logo/name 'Adarshpatel Marketing' and links to all major sections: Home, Dairy Feed, Agri Inputs, Coffee Trading, Contact. The navbar should be sticky and accessible on scroll.
acceptanceCriteria: Navbar displays 'Adarshpatel Marketing' brand name
Navigation links scroll to the correct sections
Navbar is sticky on scroll
Navbar is responsive and collapses to a hamburger menu on mobile

requirements.text: Render the generated static images (hero background, product section backgrounds) from the frontend/public/assets/generated directory throughout the website.

quotes: Create website with background of agriculture coffee fertilizer dairy all those

acceptanceCriteria: Hero background image loads from frontend/public/assets/generated
Images are displayed at appropriate sizes and positions
No broken image links

constraints: All enquiry data must be stored in the Motoko backend canister only — no external databases or email services.
Do not use blue or purple in the color palette.
Company name must always be displayed as 'Adarshpatel Marketing'.
nonGoals: No e-commerce checkout or payment processing
No integration with external inventory or ERP systems

required: Wide panoramic collage of lush green agricultural fields, coffee plantation rows, dairy cows grazing, and bags of fertilizer under warm golden sunlight — earthy, vibrant, photorealistic style (hero-bg.dim_1600x700.png)
Close-up of dairy cattle with a soft green pasture background, warm sunlight — photorealistic (dairy-feed-bg.dim_800x400.png)
Overhead flat-lay of agricultural inputs: fertilizer bags, seed packets, spray bottles, and soil — earthy tones (agri-inputs-bg.dim_800x400.png)
Rich roasted coffee beans scattered on a rustic wooden surface with a small coffee plant sprig — warm brown tones (coffee-bg.dim_800x400.png)
Stylized green leaf and wheat stalk logo mark illustration for Adarshpatel Marketing — clean, minimal, on transparent background (logo-icon.dim_256x256.png)
